title: Vietnamese Chicken with Roasted Delicate Vegetables and Provolone
description: A fusion dish that brings together the flavors of Vietnam and Italy. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: delicate vegetable medley (such as bell peppers, zucchini, carrots)
ingredients.notes: any other delicate vegetables you like

instructions: Toss delicate vegetable medley with olive oil, salt, and tagine spice blend. Roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until tender.
In a separate pan, cook chicken breast over medium heat until browned and cooked through.
Stir in vietnamese fish sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve chicken on top of roasted vegetables and top with shredded provolone cheese.
